name: Get OpCo Zips for Walk In Tub

content.query:
select
'MXH' as OpCo
,brz.[zip] as ZipCode
,zonda.[Baths_Composite_Ranking_Index]
,brz.[brn_id] as BranchID
,brn.LongName as Branch
,brz.[prg_id] as ProductGroupID
,prg.Descr as ProductGroup
,zip.[Population]
,zip.[HouseholdsPerZipCode]
,zip.[State]
,zip.[City]
,zip.[County]
,zip.[MSA_Name]
,zip.[CBSA_Name]
,zip.[PopulationEstimate]
,zip.[DeliveryResidential]
,zip.[DeliveryTotal]
FROM 
[ODS].[LP_MXH_brz_BranchZips] brz
join [ODS].[LP_MXH_brn_Branches] brn ON
brz.brn_id = brn.id
join [ODS].[LP_MXH_prg_Product_Groups] prg on
brz.prg_id = prg.id
join [ODS].[MKTDATA_ZIP_CODES_DB_DELUXE_BUSINESS] zip
on brz.zip = zip.ZipCode
left join (
    SELECT [ZipCode]
,max(convert(NUMERIC(10,3),[Baths_Composite_Ranking_Index])) as [Baths_Composite_Ranking_Index]
 FROM [ODS].[MKTDATA_ZONDA_ZIP_CODE_INDEX]
 group BY
 [ZipCode]
) zonda on 
brz.zip = zonda.ZipCode
WHERE
brn.Active = 'True'
and zip.[PrimaryRecord] = 'P'
and zip.[ClassificationCode] not in ('P','U')
and zip.[PopulationEstimate] > 1
order by 
[Baths_Composite_Ranking_Index] desc
